# polaris_data_security_policy (Resource)

The `polaris_data_security_policy` resource is used to create and manage data
security policies in RSC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `category` (String) Category of the data security policy. Valid values are MISPLACED, OVEREXPOSED, REDUNDANT and UNPROTECTED.
- `name` (String) Name of the data security policy.
- `severity` (String) Severity of the data security policy. Valid values are LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH and CRITICAL.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the data security policy.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the data security policy is enabled.
- `filter` (Block List) Filter configuration for the data security policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `threshold_filter` (Block List) Threshold filter configuration for the data security policy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--threshold_filter))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data security policy ID (UUID).
- `predefined` (Boolean) Whether the data security policy is predefined.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Optional:

- `condition` (Block List) Filter condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter--condition))
- `group` (Block List) Nested filter group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter--group))
- `op` (String) Logical operator (AND or OR). Defaults to AND.

<a id="nestedblock--filter--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter.condition`

Required:

- `filter_type` (String) Filter type (e.g. SECURITY_DOCUMENT_SENSITIVITY).
- `relationship` (String) Comparison operator (e.g. IS, IS_NOT, CONTAINS).
- `values` (List of String) Filter values.


<a id="nestedblock--filter--group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter.group`

Optional:

- `condition` (Block List) Filter condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter--group--condition))
- `op` (String) Logical operator (AND or OR). Defaults to AND.

<a id="nestedblock--filter--group--condition"></a>

Required:

- `filter_type` (String) Filter type (e.g. SECURITY_DOCUMENT_SENSITIVITY).
- `relationship` (String) Comparison operator (e.g. IS, IS_NOT, CONTAINS).
- `values` (List of String) Filter values.

- `op` (String) Logical operator (AND or OR). Defaults to AND.
